successCriteria.description: File src/modules/version/version.model.ts exists and exports interface SystemVersion with versionString, packageName, releaseTimestamp attributes
File src/modules/version/version.service.interface.ts exists and exports interface IVersionService with getVersion(): Promise<SystemVersion> method
File src/modules/version/index.ts exists and exports SystemVersion and IVersionService
All interfaces have no implementation details (abstract contract only)

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing.
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data.
RBAC enforcement: All API endpoints enforce role-based access control.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
outOfScope: Creating controller with Fastify route handler
Registering version module routes in application bootstrap
Adding any functionality beyond interface definitions
